data.name: Brothel Tycoon
data.detailed_description:
IMPORTANT!

DO NOT BUY THIS GAME ... IF:

  • you expect a visual novel - this game is NOT THAT;

  • you expect fast progress in the game - this game DOES NOT have that;

  • you don't have time and patience;

  • you expect a bunch of animations with accompanying sound - this game doesn't have that.

This game is a business simulation where you need to have patience and spend a lot of time to progress in the game.

Although the game has various professions (waitresses, dancers, hookers, maids, nurses, security guards) and different parts of the building (café, dance club, rooms for hookers), not everything is available at the beginning of the game.

TIME is the key element. I repeat once again: it is necessary to spend a lot of time in order to unlock all parts of the object and with them the jobs related to individual parts of the object.

The game has over seventy active characters, more than ten thousand images are embedded, a lot of time has been spent on the programming code that controls the entire game, but really, this game is not for everyone!

Before you decide to buy this game, check out the Discussions board, read the News, ask a question if something is unclear to you. Please, don't spit on the game later and don't complain to me later. You have been warned in time!


關於此遊戲

Brothel Tycoon is a simulation game where you are in the role of Yvonne, a young entrepreneur who wants to turn a small cafe into a luxurious place for adult entertainment.

EMPLOYEES

After Yvonne buys the cafe, it is necessary to find employees. This part starts with choosing the assistant (which is a kind of game AI) and after that you need to choose the waitresses for the cafe.

During the game, when conditions are met, Yvonne can expand her business by hiring female dancers and opening a dance club.

Further development of the business enables the employment of additional employees such as security guards, nurses, hookers and maids.

MANAGEMENT

During the game, it is possible to determine working days and shifts for employees, hire new ones and give notice to existing ones.

In addition, the basic task is to determine the prices of the services offered by the facility (in the range from -50 to +50% of the base prices).

GAME ENGINE

Although the game engine is Ren'Py, this is not a visual novel. This game is a business simulation.

There are elements of a visual novel in the game, but they are in the function of management and the selection of further actions and tasks.

"LIVE MODE" AND SEXUAL EVENTS

In addition to the conversations between the game's characters (which is performed in the form of a visual novel), the game also has a "Live Mode" where the player follows the events in various parts of the facility (café, dance and/or night club) and has an insight into all the actions that the employees do.

It is possible to see the waitresses while they serve the guests, but it is also possible to see how the nurses conduct a medical examination or what they do in their free time.

As a bonus, Yvonne has an additional option, which is not to pay the bills with money (see picture below)...

data.short_description: Brothel Tycoon is a simulation game where you are in the role of Yvonne, a young entrepreneur who wants to turn a small cafe into a luxurious place for adult entertainment.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 10 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
linux_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
